arts.ttl: Chelsea star Jadon Sancho sends clear message as Manchester United issue laid bare
arts.sum: A transfer deadline day move to Chelsea from Manchester United has led to Jadon Sancho impacting Premier League games again after eventually displacing Pedro Neto

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Manchester United live early team news and kick-off time plus how to watch
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Live updates from Selhurst Park as Man United take on Crystal Palace in Saturday's teatime kick-off in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'Fantastic' Sancho impact at Chelsea making Man Utd look foolish
arts.sum: In just two games, Sancho has looked rejuvenated and Enzo Maresca has praised the 24-year-old's impact and discipline, which was allegedly a problem at Old Trafford. 'Fantastic' Sancho impact at Chelsea making Man Utd look foolish

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy giving Man Utd star 'secret advice' in bid to increase goal output
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy returned to Manchester United in the summer as one of Erik ten Hag's new assistant managers and the Dutchman is putting his expertise to full use

arts.ttl: I think Man United's Bruno Fernandes has the edge over Arsenal's Martin Odegaard for one reason
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes is being compared favourably to Martin Odegaard in the Arsenal skipper's absence through injury by a Premier League pundit

arts.ttl: Man Utd stars give forgotten team-mate initiation ritual after injury hell
arts.sum: Manchester United left-back Tyrell Malacia has not played since the final day of the 2022/23 season after struggling with injury but the Dutchman is now back in training

arts.ttl: Report: Cottagers score six against 10-man Palace
arts.sum: The 10 men of Crystal Palace Under-18s fell to a 6-0 defeat at the hands of London rivals Fulham at Copers Cope.

arts.ttl: Report: Barcelona & Man Utd among teams targeting Ederson
arts.sum: I have an agent who has been with me for over 13 years, so the moment he thinks something positive is going to happen, he will tell me and we are in contact about that. When the 2024 summer transfer window first opened, Ederson suggested he was surprised by how much attention he was receiving and opened the door to a Premier League move in future.

arts.ttl: Scott McTominay's true Man Utd feelings shared as chief opens up on transfer chat
arts.sum: The Scotland midfielder left Manchester United for Napoli at the end of the summer transfer window after almost a decade at Old Trafford having failed to secure a starting spot under Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Follow LIVE: West Ham host Chelsea as Jadon Sancho gets first start for the Blues
arts.sum: Live updates from the London Stadium where West Ham take on Chelsea in the Premier League's early kickoff.
